task: Link dirtynth-online from the Products navigation menu.
currentImplementation: The shared Products dropdown in header.html links to VST3 Plugins, Hardware, Synth Online, Enola, and Dirtynth. Dirtynth is now served from its static index page.
serverRequirement: Dirtynth requires SharedArrayBuffer. The static index registers a scoped Service Worker that adds COOP/COEP/CORP headers for same-origin resources, so GitHub Pages can serve the synth without running server.js.
toolFallbacks: code-index MCP was not available in this session; used rg and direct file reads instead.
shrimp-task-manager MCP was not available in this session; used sequential-thinking and a direct local plan.
